creator: swhetzel@gmail.com
text:
The audio/linux-esound port will not install on amd64, due to it was marked as NOT_FOR_ARCH=amd64 by kris because of a problem with its distinfo file in Revision 1.11 Makefile.

This was fixed in the Revision 1.13 Makefile when the port was changed to use the Fecora binaries, and the bsd.linux-rpm.mk include file.

Fix: 

Remove the NOT_FOR_ARCH variable from the Makefile.
How-To-Repeat: On a amd64, try to install audio/linux-esound.
